title: arctostaphylos columbiana f. setosissima
intro: Arctostaphylos columbiana f. setosissima, also known as the thimbleberry, is a variety of the bearberry plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being high in antioxidants and having antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos columbiana f. setosissima include its potential to prevent and treat urinary tract infections, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Arctostaphylos columbiana f. setosissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
